name: @harness/release
description: ISSUE-080 — the release/canary model: branch-per-environment auto-deploy contract, the four-gate operator-promoted canary train, rollback-by-redeploy (schema forward-only), the fleet version-skew alert, and the plugins-out-of-train guard. Build-time logic + gates; the live push→Railway auto-deploy+migrate proof + the OD-173 Wait-for-CI spike are the two-party capstone.
